title: castanea eonii
intro: Castanea eonii, also known as Korean chestnut, is a species of chestnut tree native to Korea and China. It is valued for its edible nuts, as well as its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Castanea eonii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Castanea eonii is often prepared as a tea, powder, or tincture, and is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and fever.
